picks.title: Viva CalleSJ: East Side Quest
picks.venue: White Road and Alum Rock Avenue
picks.why: Rare open streets event closes East San José to cars for walking, biking, and community celebration.

picks.title: Palo Alto Earth Day Festival

picks.title: Santa Clara Spring Citywide Garage Sale
